natural_language: Strong existence trace does not guarantee value.
Even the most sublime value does not guarantee strong existence trace.

impact_worship.pattern: scale / dominance / persistence / visibility / survival -> value

value_romanticism.error: high V_o assumed to guarantee S_e
value_romanticism.pattern: sublimity / openness / ethical force -> survival / propagation / registration

diagnostic_axes.value_axis: Did the structure preserve future relational openness?
diagnostic_axes.propagation_axis: What path, cost, medium, authority, repetition, or coupling conditions allow value to register?

diagnostic_matrix.low_S_e_high_V_o: value without strong trace; fragility/non-registration risk
diagnostic_matrix.high_S_e_high_V_o: strong trace and value openness; still requires governance
diagnostic_matrix.low_S_e_low_V_o: weak trace and weak openness; low coupled significance or residue

negative_constraints: Do not infer value from trace.
Do not infer trace from value.
Do not treat weak trace as proof of low value.
Do not treat high value as proof of survival.
